src/main/java/h2/orm/core/TransactionMan.general_idea: Removed the finally block from the isActive method to prevent closing the EntityManager while the transaction state is being checked.

src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SpringBootS.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the new package structure of the JpaRepository class.

src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SuperSimple.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect a package restructuring of the JpaRepository class.

pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler source and target from JDK 24 to JDK 21 to align with the migration goal.

.idea/copilotDiffState.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK version.
